hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; changed=$(git status --porcelain); [ -z "$changed" ] && exit 0; fail=""; if echo "$changed" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then python -m unittest discover tests >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail="python"; fi; if echo "$changed" | grep -qE "^.. ?extension/"; then (cd extension && npm test >/dev/null 2>&1) || fail="$fail extension"; fi; [ -n "$fail" ] && echo "FAILING TEST SUITE(S):$fail — CI only runs the python suite, so a red extension suite ships silently. Run it and fix before finishing." >&2 && exit 2; exit 0'

bash -c 'f=$(python -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *native_host.py|*__main__.py|*NoMorePwn.py) grep -nE "^[[:space:]]*print\(|^[[:space:]]*sys\.stdout\.write\(" "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "WARNING: $f is on the --native-host stdio path. Any stdout write outside _send() corrupts the 4-byte-length frame protocol; the only symptom is a dropped browser connection. Use stderr." >&2;; esac; exit 0'
